title: Death Count
description: A lightweight Paper plugin that lets players check their death count with a simple command.
body: ## DeathCount DeathCount is a lightweight Paper and Folia plugin that allows players to quickly check how many times they or other players have died on the server. The plugin uses Minecraft’s built-in death statistics and provides a simple command-based interface with no configuration required. It is designed to be minimal, fast, and easy to use on survival servers. ### Commands - `/deaths` — View your own death count - `/deaths ` — View another player's death count ### Features - Uses vanilla Minecraft statistics - Lightweight and performance-friendly - No configuration files required - Works on both Paper and Folia servers - Simple and intuitive command usage DeathCount is ideal for servers that want quick access to death statistics without adding unnecessary complexity.
